inputs.failure_history: Across 8 runs, the reviewer agent missed missing-test cases 5 times.

improvement.change: add an explicit 'list untested changed functions' step to the reviewer prompt

expected_outputs.rollout_plan: Ship behind a prompt flag; A/B on 20 reviews; revert by clearing the flag if no improvement.

notes: Detects a repeated failure pattern and proposes a tested, reversible improvement.
